title: Cobblemon Field Moves
description: Adds the in-world effects of field moves and abilities to Cobblemon.
body:
Adds the in-world effects of field moves and abilities to Cobblemon.

# Pickup  / Honey Gather

After winning a battle, each Pokemon with this ability has the chance to acquire an item from the relevent loot table if they aren't already holding one.

## Datapackability

Add loot tables for *any* ability.

# Synchronize

When a Pokemon spawns nearby, there's a higher chance it will have the same nature as a Pokemon in your party with the Synchronize ability.

## Configuration

Change the chance and whether or not the Pokemon must be first in your party.
